note: JORDÁ (son) entry begins on this leaf and continues into leaf 644 (its description completes with 'leares, part. jud. de Inca, térm. y jurisd. de la v. de Sansellas'). Title is on this leaf so entry assigned here.

entries.title: JONOY (son)
entries.description: Predio en la isla de Mallorca, prov. de Baleares, part. jud. de Inca, térm. y jurisd. de la villa de Alaró.
